##NAMES=Dietzeite
##RRUFFID=R130292
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ca_2_(IO_3_)_2_(CrO_4_)·H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Maria Elena mine, Atacama Desert, Tocopilla Province, Antofagasta Region, Chile
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Rock Currier
##DESCRIPTION=Yellow tabular crystals, associated with colorless nitratine
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R130292
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Ca_1.63_(I_0.93_O_3_)_2.00_(Cr_1.21_S_0.03_O_4_)_1.00_·H_2_O ; The total is low due to possible dehydration during the probe
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 10.1366 b: 7.2588 c: 13.983 alpha: 90 beta: 106.607 gamma: 90 volume: 985.9 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
